fields.description: Master switch. When off, the desk falls back to the stock Frappe sidebar.
fields.label: Enable Desk Rail

fields.description: Hide the native workspace sidebar and use the persistent rail everywhere (workspace, list, form).
fields.label: Replace native sidebar

fields.description: Width of the rail in pixels.
fields.label: Rail width (px)

fields.description: Show a show/hide toggle button to the left of the logo in the navbar. The collapsed state persists per user.
fields.label: Show navbar toggle

fields.description: On phones the rail starts collapsed (off-canvas) and opens on demand.
fields.label: Collapsed by default on mobile

fields.description: Let the navbar content span the full width instead of Bootstrap's centered container.
fields.label: Full-width navbar

fields.description: Hide the inline standard-filter inputs row at the top of list views (the Filter button stays).
fields.label: Hide list filter bar
